text: Being here, I feel a curious blend of anticipation and contemplation. The first scene, quiet and sterile, evokes the liminality of thresholds—glass doors, white walls, and polished floors suggesting potential and transition. I feel momentarily unanchored, as if suspended in possibility, awaiting purpose. Stepping into the second scene, the atmosphere bursts with color and ideas. The intentional design commands attention, immersing me in thought about the relationship between humans and technology, the intersections of research and creation. Here, I am moved to reflect on the ongoing dance between order and imagination—a space that asks questions and encourages wonder.
